name: osop
description: OSOP workflow authoring, validation, and execution skill for OpenClaw-compatible AI agents.
author: osop

required.name: OSOP_MCP_URL
required.description: URL of the OSOP MCP server. The skill will not activate unless this is set.

optional.name: OSOP_APPROVAL_MODE
optional.description: Controls approval gate behavior. 'auto' skips human approval, 'manual' requires it.
